Both files have been created exactly as specified:

- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/worker/claude-bridge.ts` -- The Claude SDK bridge class with streaming, message handling, and session management.
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/worker/index.ts` -- The worker entry point with IPC connection, message dispatch, and bridge lifecycle management.
